ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., QB, RB, WR, D/ST) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player belongs to */,
  "player_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "player_height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "player_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "player_college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "player_draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "player_draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted */,
  "player_draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (e.g., Active, Injured, Retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "week" TEXT /* Week number of the game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "game_location" TEXT /* Location of the game (e.g., Home, Away) */,
  "game_result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., Win, Loss, Tie) */,
  "game_attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  "game_weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "actual_score" REAL /* Actual score of the player in the game */,
  "proj_score" REAL /* Projected score of the player in the game */,
  "boom_pct" REAL /* Boom percentage of the player */,
  "boom_pts" REAL /* Boom points of the player */,
  "bust_pct" REAL /* Bust percentage of the player */,
  "bust_pts" REAL /* Bust points of the player */,
  "mid_pct" REAL /* Mid percentage of the player */,
  "fantasy_points_allowed" REAL /* Fantasy points allowed by the player */,
  "fantasy_points_against" REAL /* Fantasy points against the player */,
  "fantasy_points_created" REAL /* Fantasy points created by the player */,
  "fantasy_points_vs_proj" REAL /* Difference between actual and projected fantasy points */,
  "fantasy_points_vs_last_week" REAL /* Difference between this week's and last week's fantasy points */,
  "fantasy_points_vs_season_avg" REAL /* Difference between this week's and the player's season average fantasy points */,
  "fantasy_points_vs_career_avg" REAL /* Difference between this week's and the player's career average fantasy points */,
  "fantasy_points_vs_opponent_avg" REAL /* Difference between this week's and the opponent's average fantasy points allowed */,
  "fantasy_points_vs_opponent_last_week" REAL /* Difference between this week's and the opponent's last week's fantasy points allowed */,
  "fantasy_points_vs_opponent_season_avg" REAL /* Difference between this week's and the opponent's season average fantasy points allowed */,
  "fantasy_points_vs_opponent_career_avg" REAL /* Difference between this week's and the opponent's career average fantasy points allowed */,
  "fantasy_points_vs_team_avg" REAL /* Difference between this week's and the player's team's average fantasy points */,
  "fantasy_points_vs_team_last_week" REAL /* Difference between this week's and the player's team's last week's fantasy points */,
  "fantasy_points_vs_team_season_avg" REAL /* Difference between this week's and the player's team's season average fantasy points */,
  "fantasy_points_vs_team_career_avg" REAL /* Difference between this week's and the player's team's career average fantasy points */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
